name: secret-santa
description: Secret Santa — fullstack training project (santa-api, santa-notifications, santa-app). Root package wires the dev CI gate (Husky + commitlint + lint-staged); each app has its own package.json.

scripts.ci: for app in santa-api santa-notifications santa-app; do echo "▶ CI: $app"; ( cd "$app" && npm run lint && npm run type-check && npm test ) || exit 1; done
